title: WESTERN LANE CRISIS RESPONSE - 211info
text: WESTERN LANE CRISIS RESPONSE WESTERN LANE CRISIS RESPONSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person crisis services including de-escalation, suicide risk assessment, safety planning, and resource navingation. Also offers follow-up support for mental health, substance use, and other life crises. 2625 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 997-3515 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 997-3515 Florence Police Department Non-Emergency Emergency 911 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Florence, Dunes City, Mapleton, Swisshome, Westlake Services: In Person Crisis Intervention If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
